title: Property Consultant - Marathon Realty - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Marathon Realty - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
